tasks.title: Setup Project Repository Structure
tasks.description: Create the modular Python package structure with proper directories and initialization files
tasks.details:
Create the directory structure as specified in the PRD:
- research/input/ for source documents
- research/output/ for processed markdown files
- docling_converter/ main package with __init__.py
- docling_converter/pipelines/ with __init__.py
- Create pyproject.toml with project metadata and dependencies
- Initialize git repository with proper .gitignore for Python projects
- Add README.md with project overview
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all directories exist, __init__.py files are present, and pyproject.toml is valid TOML format

subtasks.title: Create directory structure with all required folders
subtasks.description: Set up the complete folder hierarchy for the repository including source code directories, tests, documentation, and configuration folders
subtasks.details: Create main project directory and subdirectories such as src/, tests/, docs/, scripts/, and any other necessary folders for proper project organization

subtasks.title: Initialize Python package files (__init__.py)
subtasks.description: Create __init__.py files in all Python package directories to make them importable modules
subtasks.details: Add __init__.py files to the src/ directory and any subdirectories that should be treated as Python packages, including basic package initialization code if needed

subtasks.title: Configure pyproject.toml with basic metadata
subtasks.description: Create and configure the pyproject.toml file with essential project metadata, dependencies, and build configuration
subtasks.details: Set up pyproject.toml with project name, version, description, author information, dependencies, build system requirements, and tool configurations for linting and testing

subtasks.title: Initialize git repository with .gitignore and README
subtasks.description: Initialize the git repository and create essential files for version control and project documentation
subtasks.details: Run git init, create a comprehensive .gitignore file for Python projects, and write a basic README.md with project description and setup instructions

tasks.title: Configure Project Dependencies
tasks.description: Setup pyproject.toml with all required dependencies including Docling, LangChain, and CLI libraries
tasks.details:
Configure pyproject.toml with:
- docling for document processing
- langchain and langchain-docling for LLM integration
- typer or click for CLI interface
- pytest for testing
- Additional dependencies: pathlib, typing, dataclasses
- Set Python version requirement (>=3.8)
- Configure build system and entry points
tasks.testStrategy: Run pip install -e . to verify dependencies install correctly and no conflicts exist

subtasks.title: Research and specify core dependencies
subtasks.description: Research and define core runtime dependencies including docling and langchain with appropriate version constraints to ensure compatibility and stability
subtasks.details: Investigate current stable versions of docling and langchain, analyze their compatibility requirements, define version constraints using semantic versioning, and document any known conflicts or compatibility issues

subtasks.title: Configure development dependencies
subtasks.description: Set up development-specific dependencies including pytest for testing and linting tools for code quality assurance
subtasks.details: Define pytest configuration with appropriate plugins, configure linting tools (flake8, black, isort), set up pre-commit hooks, and ensure development dependencies don't conflict with core dependencies

subtasks.title: Set up build system configuration and entry points
subtasks.description: Configure pyproject.toml with build system settings, project metadata, and define entry points for the application
subtasks.details: Configure build-system table with setuptools/wheel, define project metadata (name, version, description), set up entry points for CLI or package imports, and ensure all dependency specifications are properly formatted

tasks.title: Implement Configuration Management
tasks.description: Create centralized configuration system for chunk sizes, model IDs, and pipeline settings
tasks.details:
Create config.py with:
- Configuration dataclass with MIN_TOKENS, MAX_TOKENS defaults
- Model configuration for LLM endpoints
- File format detection mappings
- Pipeline-specific settings (PDF format options, HTML parsing settings)
- Environment variable support for overrides
- Validation for configuration values
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for configuration loading, validation, and environment variable overrides

subtasks.title: Design configuration dataclass structure with all required fields
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive dataclass structure that defines all configuration fields, their types, default values, and documentation. Include nested configurations for different application components.
subtasks.details: Define dataclass with proper type hints, default values, field validation attributes, and organize related settings into logical groups. Consider using dataclasses, pydantic models, or similar structured approach.

subtasks.title: Implement environment variable loading and validation
subtasks.description: Build functionality to load configuration values from environment variables with proper type conversion, validation, and fallback mechanisms.
subtasks.details: Create environment variable parser that maps env vars to dataclass fields, handles type conversion (string to int/bool/etc), validates values, and provides clear error messages for invalid configurations.

subtasks.title: Create configuration file parsing logic
subtasks.description: Implement configuration file loading support for multiple formats (JSON, YAML, TOML) with proper parsing, merging, and precedence handling.
subtasks.details: Build file parser that can read different config file formats, merge multiple config sources, handle nested configurations, and maintain proper precedence order (env vars > config files > defaults).

subtasks.title: Add configuration validation and error handling
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive validation logic with custom validators, dependency checks, and user-friendly error reporting for configuration issues.
subtasks.details: Create validation framework that checks field constraints, cross-field dependencies, required vs optional settings, and provides detailed error messages with suggestions for fixing configuration problems.

tasks.title: Create Base Pipeline Abstract Class
tasks.description: Implement the abstract base class that defines the interface for all format-specific pipelines
tasks.details:
Create base_pipeline.py with:
- Abstract BasePipeline class using ABC
- Abstract process() method signature
- Common initialization with config parameter
- Shared utility methods for file validation
- Error handling patterns
- Logging setup for pipeline operations
- Type hints for input/output specifications
tasks.testStrategy: Verify abstract class cannot be instantiated directly and subclasses must implement process() method

subtasks.title: Design abstract base class interface and method signatures
subtasks.description: Create the foundational abstract base class with core method signatures that all pipeline implementations must follow, including abstract methods for processing, validation, and lifecycle management
subtasks.details: Define abstract methods like process(), validate_input(), setup(), teardown(), and get_status(). Establish the contract that concrete implementations must fulfill while ensuring flexibility for different pipeline types.

subtasks.title: Implement common initialization and configuration handling
subtasks.description: Build the shared initialization logic and configuration management system that all pipeline classes will inherit, including parameter validation and default settings
subtasks.details: Create __init__ method with common parameters, configuration loading from files/environment variables, parameter validation, and default value assignment. Ensure thread-safe initialization patterns.

subtasks.title: Add shared utility methods for file validation
subtasks.description: Implement common file handling utilities including path validation, file existence checks, permission verification, and format validation that can be reused across all pipeline implementations
subtasks.details: Create methods for checking file paths, validating file formats, ensuring read/write permissions, handling file locks, and providing consistent error messages for file-related issues.

subtasks.title: Create error handling patterns and logging setup
subtasks.description: Establish standardized error handling mechanisms and logging configuration that provides consistent error reporting and debugging capabilities across all pipeline implementations
subtasks.details: Define custom exception classes, implement try-catch patterns, set up structured logging with appropriate levels, create error context preservation, and establish retry mechanisms for recoverable errors.

subtasks.title: Add comprehensive type hints and documentation
subtasks.description: Apply complete type annotations throughout the abstract base class and add thorough documentation including docstrings, usage examples, and implementation guidelines for future developers
subtasks.details: Add type hints for all methods, parameters, and return values. Write comprehensive docstrings following standard conventions, create usage examples, document expected behaviors, and provide clear guidelines for concrete implementations.

tasks.title: Implement Intelligent Chunk Consolidation Utility
tasks.description: Create the consolidate_chunks function that merges small chunks with neighbors to prevent data loss
tasks.details:
Implement in utils.py:
- consolidate_chunks(chunks, min_tokens, max_tokens) function
- Algorithm to identify chunks below MIN_TOKENS threshold
- Logic to merge with adjacent chunks (previous or next)
- Prioritize merges that create balanced chunk sizes
- Ensure no chunk exceeds MAX_TOKENS after merging
- Preserve chunk metadata and boundaries where possible
- Handle edge cases (first/last chunks, all chunks too small)
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with various chunk size scenarios, edge cases, and validation that no content is lost during consolidation

subtasks.title: Design chunk consolidation algorithm and data structures
subtasks.description: Design the core algorithm architecture and define data structures for chunk consolidation, including chunk metadata, consolidation strategies, and memory management approaches
subtasks.details: Create algorithm flowcharts, define chunk data structures with size/position metadata, design consolidation decision tree, and establish memory allocation patterns for efficient processing

subtasks.title: Implement chunk size analysis and threshold detection
subtasks.description: Develop functionality to analyze chunk sizes and detect when consolidation thresholds are met, including dynamic threshold calculation based on system resources
subtasks.details: Implement size measurement algorithms, create threshold detection logic, add dynamic threshold adjustment based on available memory and performance metrics

subtasks.title: Create merge logic for adjacent chunks
subtasks.description: Implement the core merging functionality that combines adjacent chunks while preserving data integrity and maintaining proper chunk boundaries
subtasks.details: Develop chunk merging algorithms, implement data copying mechanisms, ensure proper memory deallocation of original chunks, and maintain chunk ordering

subtasks.title: Add optimization for balanced chunk sizes
subtasks.description: Implement optimization algorithms to ensure consolidated chunks maintain balanced sizes for optimal performance and memory utilization
subtasks.details: Create size balancing algorithms, implement chunk splitting when oversized, add performance metrics tracking, and optimize for target chunk size ranges

subtasks.title: Implement edge case handling (boundary chunks)
subtasks.description: Handle special cases including boundary chunks, partial chunks, empty chunks, and chunks at data structure limits to prevent data corruption
subtasks.details: Implement boundary condition checks, handle first/last chunk scenarios, manage partial data preservation, and add validation for chunk integrity at boundaries

subtasks.title: Add comprehensive testing and validation
subtasks.description: Create extensive test suites covering all consolidation scenarios, performance benchmarks, and data integrity validation to ensure no data loss occurs
subtasks.details: Develop unit tests for all functions, create integration tests for full consolidation workflows, implement stress testing with large datasets, and add data integrity verification checks

tasks.title: Implement PDF Pipeline
tasks.description: Create PDF-specific processing pipeline with optimized table recognition and PDF format options
tasks.details:
Create pdf_pipeline.py with PdfPipeline class:
- Inherit from BasePipeline
- Configure PdfFormatOption for table structure recognition
- Use Docling's HybridChunker for semantic chunking
- Implement PDF-specific preprocessing (OCR if needed)
- Handle PDF metadata extraction
- Apply consolidate_chunks utility
- Error handling for corrupted PDFs
- Progress tracking for large files
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various PDF types (text-based, scanned, tables, complex layouts) and verify output quality and chunk consolidation

subtasks.title: Set up PDF pipeline class structure inheriting from BasePipeline
subtasks.description: Create the foundational PDFPipeline class that inherits from BasePipeline, establishing the core structure with required methods and initialization parameters for PDF document processing.
subtasks.details: Define class constructor, inherit from BasePipeline, set up basic configuration parameters, and establish method signatures for PDF-specific processing workflow.

subtasks.title: Configure Docling PDF format options for table recognition
subtasks.description: Set up and configure Docling library options specifically for PDF processing with enhanced table recognition capabilities and format preservation.
subtasks.details: Configure Docling PDF parser settings, enable table detection and extraction features, set up format options for maintaining document structure, and establish table recognition parameters.

subtasks.title: Implement PDF preprocessing and metadata extraction
subtasks.description: Develop preprocessing functionality to extract metadata, analyze document structure, and prepare PDF content for further processing steps.
subtasks.details: Extract PDF metadata (title, author, creation date), analyze document structure, identify page layouts, extract text and formatting information, and prepare content for chunking.

subtasks.title: Integrate HybridChunker for semantic chunking
subtasks.description: Implement integration with HybridChunker to perform intelligent semantic chunking of PDF content while preserving document structure and context.
subtasks.details: Configure HybridChunker for PDF content, implement semantic chunking logic, maintain document hierarchy, preserve table and figure contexts, and ensure optimal chunk sizes.

subtasks.title: Add OCR handling for scanned PDFs
subtasks.description: Implement OCR capabilities to handle scanned PDFs and image-based content, converting them to searchable text while maintaining layout information.
subtasks.details: Integrate OCR engine, detect scanned vs native PDFs, process image-based content, extract text from images, maintain spatial layout information, and handle OCR confidence scoring.

subtasks.title: Integrate chunk consolidation utility
subtasks.description: Implement chunk consolidation functionality to optimize chunk sizes, merge related content, and ensure coherent document segments.
subtasks.details: Implement chunk merging logic, optimize chunk boundaries, consolidate related content sections, maintain semantic coherence, and ensure appropriate chunk sizes for downstream processing.

subtasks.title: Implement comprehensive error handling and progress tracking
subtasks.description: Develop robust error handling mechanisms and progress tracking system for the entire PDF processing pipeline with detailed logging and recovery options.
subtasks.details: Implement try-catch blocks for all processing steps, add progress tracking with percentage completion, create detailed error logging, implement recovery mechanisms, and add pipeline status reporting.

tasks.title: Implement HTML Pipeline
tasks.description: Create HTML-specific processing pipeline with optimized HTML parsing and structure preservation
tasks.details:
Create html_pipeline.py with HtmlPipeline class:
- Inherit from BasePipeline
- Use Docling's default HTML converter settings
- Preserve HTML structure and semantic elements
- Handle embedded CSS and JavaScript gracefully
- Extract and preserve links and media references
- Apply consolidate_chunks utility
- Handle malformed HTML documents
- Support for various HTML encodings
tasks.testStrategy: Test with different HTML documents (simple pages, complex layouts, embedded content) and verify structure preservation

subtasks.title: Create HTML pipeline class inheriting from BasePipeline
subtasks.description: Implement a new HTMLPipeline class that extends the BasePipeline base class, establishing the foundational structure for HTML document processing with proper initialization and configuration methods.
subtasks.details: Create class structure with __init__ method, inherit from BasePipeline, set up basic configuration parameters, and define class-level constants for HTML processing

subtasks.title: Configure Docling HTML converter with structure preservation
subtasks.description: Set up and configure the Docling HTML converter to maintain document structure, formatting, and hierarchical elements during the conversion process.
subtasks.details: Initialize Docling converter with HTML-specific settings, configure structure preservation options, set up formatting retention parameters, and establish conversion pipeline settings

subtasks.title: Implement HTML parsing with encoding support
subtasks.description: Develop robust HTML parsing functionality that can handle various character encodings, malformed HTML documents, and different HTML standards while maintaining data integrity.
subtasks.details: Implement encoding detection and handling, create HTML parsing logic with error tolerance, add support for different HTML versions, and ensure proper character encoding conversion

subtasks.title: Add link and media reference extraction
subtasks.description: Implement functionality to extract and catalog all links, images, videos, and other media references from HTML documents, maintaining their context and relationships.
subtasks.details: Create link extraction methods for href attributes, implement media reference detection for images/videos/audio, maintain reference context and metadata, and handle relative vs absolute URLs

subtasks.title: Integrate chunk consolidation and error handling
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling mechanisms and chunk consolidation logic to manage processing failures, malformed HTML, and optimize document chunking for downstream processing.
subtasks.details: Add try-catch blocks for parsing errors, implement chunk size optimization, create fallback mechanisms for malformed HTML, and establish logging and error reporting systems

tasks.title: Implement File Format Detection
tasks.description: Create automatic file format detection system to route files to appropriate pipelines
tasks.details:
Add to utils.py:
- detect_file_format(file_path) function
- Extension-based detection (.pdf, .html, .htm)
- MIME type validation as fallback
- Support for case-insensitive extensions
- Error handling for unsupported formats
- Extensible mapping system for future formats
- File existence and readability validation
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various file extensions, edge cases (no extension, wrong extension), and verify correct pipeline selection

subtasks.title: Implement extension-based detection with case-insensitive mapping
subtasks.description: Create a file extension detection system that maps file extensions to their corresponding formats using case-insensitive comparison to handle various extension cases (.PDF, .pdf, .Pdf, etc.)
subtasks.details: Build a comprehensive mapping dictionary of file extensions to format types, implement case-insensitive string comparison logic, and create functions to extract and normalize file extensions from file paths or names.

subtasks.title: Add MIME type validation as fallback detection method
subtasks.description: Implement MIME type detection as a secondary validation method when extension-based detection fails or needs verification, using file content analysis to determine the actual file format
subtasks.details: Integrate MIME type detection libraries or utilities, create mapping between MIME types and file formats, implement fallback logic that triggers when extension detection is inconclusive, and ensure accurate content-based format identification.

subtasks.title: Create file validation and error handling for unsupported formats
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive validation logic to verify file format compatibility and implement robust error handling for unsupported or corrupted file formats with informative user feedback
subtasks.details: Define supported file format specifications, create validation functions that combine extension and MIME type results, implement error handling with specific error messages for different failure scenarios, and provide user-friendly feedback for unsupported formats with suggestions for alternatives.

tasks.title: Create CLI Entry Point
tasks.description: Implement the main CLI interface using Typer with file processing and pipeline orchestration
tasks.details:
Create main.py with:
- Typer CLI application setup
- File path argument with validation
- Output directory option with default
- Verbose logging option
- File format detection and pipeline selection
- Pipeline instantiation and execution
- Error handling and user-friendly messages
- Progress indicators for large files
- Support for batch processing multiple files
tasks.testStrategy: Test CLI with various file types, invalid inputs, missing files, and verify proper error messages and output generation

subtasks.title: Set up Typer CLI application structure with argument parsing
subtasks.description: Create the foundational CLI application using Typer framework with proper command structure, argument definitions, and option parsing for file inputs, output destinations, and configuration parameters
subtasks.details: Initialize Typer app, define main command structure, implement argument parsing for input files, output directories, format options, and configuration flags. Set up proper help documentation and command validation.

subtasks.title: Implement file validation and format detection integration
subtasks.description: Integrate file validation logic and automatic format detection capabilities into the CLI workflow to ensure input files are valid and properly identified before processing
subtasks.details: Add file existence checks, format detection using file extensions and content analysis, validation of supported formats, and early error detection for invalid inputs. Implement proper error messages for unsupported file types.

subtasks.title: Add pipeline selection and instantiation logic
subtasks.description: Implement the core logic for selecting appropriate processing pipelines based on detected file formats and user preferences, then instantiate and configure the selected pipeline
subtasks.details: Create pipeline factory pattern, implement format-to-pipeline mapping, add configuration parameter passing to pipelines, and handle pipeline initialization with proper error handling for unsupported combinations.

subtasks.title: Create progress indicators and user feedback systems
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive user feedback mechanisms including progress bars, status messages, and real-time updates to keep users informed during processing operations
subtasks.details: Implement progress bars using rich or similar library, add verbose logging options, create status indicators for different processing stages, and provide estimated completion times and throughput metrics.

subtasks.title: Implement comprehensive error handling and user-friendly messages
subtasks.description: Create robust error handling throughout the CLI application with clear, actionable error messages and graceful failure recovery mechanisms
subtasks.details: Add try-catch blocks for all major operations, implement custom exception types, create user-friendly error message formatting, add suggestions for common issues, and implement graceful cleanup on failures.

tasks.title: Implement Basic Output Generation
tasks.description: Create output file generation system that saves processed chunks to markdown files
tasks.details:
Add to main.py and utils.py:
- save_chunks_to_markdown(chunks, output_path) function
- Generate organized directory structure in output/
- Create individual chunk files with metadata headers
- Generate index file with chunk summaries
- Handle file naming conflicts
- Preserve original document metadata
- Support for different output formats (individual chunks vs combined)
tasks.testStrategy: Verify output files are created correctly, contain expected content, and directory structure is organized properly

subtasks.title: Design output directory structure and file naming conventions
subtasks.description: Define the hierarchical directory structure for output files and establish consistent naming conventions for generated files including prefixes, suffixes, and date/time stamps
subtasks.details: Create specifications for folder organization (e.g., by date, project, or content type), file naming patterns that avoid conflicts, and directory creation logic. Include considerations for nested structures and path length limitations.

subtasks.title: Implement markdown file generation with metadata headers
subtasks.description: Develop functionality to generate markdown files with proper YAML frontmatter or metadata headers containing relevant information about the content
subtasks.details: Build markdown generation engine that includes metadata such as creation date, source information, tags, and content summary. Implement proper markdown formatting, escaping, and structure validation.

subtasks.title: Create index file generation with chunk summaries
subtasks.description: Build system to generate comprehensive index files that provide summaries and navigation for all generated content chunks
subtasks.details: Implement index file creation with table of contents, chunk summaries, cross-references, and navigation links. Include search functionality and categorization of content by type or topic.

subtasks.title: Add file conflict resolution and output format options
subtasks.description: Implement conflict detection and resolution strategies for existing files, along with multiple output format options and user preferences
subtasks.details: Create conflict resolution mechanisms (overwrite, append, rename, skip), support for multiple output formats (markdown, HTML, JSON), and user configuration options for output preferences and formatting styles.

tasks.title: Add Comprehensive Error Handling and Logging
tasks.description: Implement robust error handling and logging throughout the pipeline system
tasks.details:
Enhance all modules with:
- Structured logging using Python logging module
- Custom exception classes for different error types
- Graceful error recovery where possible
- Detailed error messages with context
- Log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR)
- Log file output option
- Performance metrics logging
- Memory usage monitoring for large files
tasks.testStrategy: Test error scenarios (corrupted files, insufficient memory, network issues) and verify appropriate logging and error handling

subtasks.title: Design custom exception hierarchy for different error types
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive exception hierarchy with base exception classes and specific error types for validation, network, database, authentication, and business logic errors
subtasks.details: Define base exception classes, create specific exception types for different error categories, implement error codes and messages, ensure proper inheritance structure, and add serialization support for error details

subtasks.title: Implement structured logging configuration with multiple levels
subtasks.description: Set up a robust logging framework with configurable levels, formatters, handlers, and output destinations including file rotation and remote logging capabilities
subtasks.details: Configure logging levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, CRITICAL), implement structured log formatters (JSON/structured text), set up file rotation and retention policies, configure console and file handlers, and establish remote logging endpoints

subtasks.title: Add error recovery mechanisms where possible
subtasks.description: Implement retry logic, circuit breakers, fallback mechanisms, and graceful degradation strategies for handling transient failures and system resilience
subtasks.details: Implement exponential backoff retry mechanisms, create circuit breaker patterns for external services, design fallback strategies for critical operations, add timeout handling, and establish graceful shutdown procedures

subtasks.title: Create performance and memory monitoring
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive monitoring system to track application performance metrics, memory usage, resource consumption, and system health indicators
subtasks.details: Implement performance counters and timers, create memory usage tracking, monitor CPU and I/O metrics, set up health check endpoints, establish alerting thresholds, and create dashboard integration capabilities

subtasks.title: Integrate logging throughout all existing modules
subtasks.description: Systematically add comprehensive logging statements across all application modules, ensuring consistent log levels, proper error context, and performance impact considerations
subtasks.details: Add logging to all major functions and error paths, implement contextual logging with correlation IDs, ensure proper log level usage, add performance logging for critical operations, and validate logging integration across all modules

tasks.title: Implement LLM Refiner Module
tasks.description: Create the LLM integration module for AI-augmented content synthesis using LangChain
tasks.details:
Create llm_refiner.py with:
- LLM client setup using LangChain's ChatOpenAI
- refine_document(content: list[str]) function
- System prompt template as specified in PRD
- Local LLM endpoint configuration (Ollama, vLLM compatible)
- Chunk content formatting for LLM input
- Response parsing and validation
- Error handling for LLM failures
- Fallback to non-refined output if LLM unavailable
tasks.testStrategy: Test with mock LLM responses, actual local LLM if available, and verify proper prompt formatting and response handling

subtasks.title: Set up LangChain integration and LLM client configuration
subtasks.description: Initialize LangChain framework, configure LLM client connections, and establish base communication protocols with language models
subtasks.details: Install LangChain dependencies, create LLM client wrapper classes, configure authentication and connection parameters, implement basic client initialization and health checks

subtasks.title: Design and implement system prompt templates
subtasks.description: Create structured prompt templates with variable placeholders and context injection capabilities for consistent LLM interactions
subtasks.details: Design prompt template structure, implement template engine with variable substitution, create role-based prompts, add context formatting and instruction clarity optimization

subtasks.title: Create content formatting for LLM input processing
subtasks.description: Develop input preprocessing pipeline to format and sanitize content before sending to LLM endpoints
subtasks.details: Implement text preprocessing functions, create input validation and sanitization, add token counting and length management, format structured data for LLM consumption

subtasks.title: Implement response parsing and validation logic
subtasks.description: Build response processing pipeline to parse, validate, and structure LLM outputs into usable formats
subtasks.details: Create response parsing utilities, implement output validation schemas, add structured data extraction from responses, handle malformed or incomplete responses

subtasks.title: Add local LLM endpoint configuration (Ollama/vLLM)
subtasks.description: Configure support for local LLM deployments using Ollama and vLLM endpoints with proper connection management
subtasks.details: Implement Ollama client integration, add vLLM endpoint support, create local model discovery and selection, configure local endpoint health monitoring and connection pooling

subtasks.title: Create fallback mechanisms and error handling
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling, retry logic, and fallback strategies for robust LLM service operation
subtasks.details: Design retry mechanisms with exponential backoff, implement fallback endpoint switching, create error classification and handling strategies, add logging and monitoring for failure scenarios

tasks.title: Add Refine Flag to CLI
tasks.description: Integrate the --refine option into the CLI to enable LLM-powered document synthesis
tasks.details:
Enhance main.py with:
- --refine boolean flag option
- Conditional workflow: normal chunking vs LLM refinement
- Integration with llm_refiner module
- Single output file generation for refined documents
- Progress indicators for LLM processing
- Configuration validation for LLM endpoints
- Graceful degradation if LLM is unavailable
tasks.testStrategy: Test both --refine and normal modes, verify different output formats, and test error handling when LLM is unavailable

subtasks.title: Add --refine flag to CLI with proper option configuration
subtasks.description: Implement the --refine command-line flag with proper argument parsing, help text, and option validation to enable refined processing mode
subtasks.details: Configure CLI parser to accept --refine flag, add appropriate help documentation, validate flag usage, and ensure proper integration with existing CLI structure

subtasks.title: Implement conditional workflow logic for normal vs refined processing
subtasks.description: Create branching logic in the main workflow to handle both normal processing and refined processing paths based on the --refine flag state
subtasks.details: Modify main processing pipeline to detect refine flag, implement conditional execution paths, ensure proper data flow between normal and refined modes, and maintain backward compatibility

subtasks.title: Integrate LLM refiner module with progress tracking
subtasks.description: Connect the LLM refiner module to the refined processing workflow with comprehensive progress tracking and status reporting
subtasks.details: Import and configure LLM refiner module, implement progress callbacks, add status indicators for refinement stages, handle LLM response processing, and ensure proper error propagation

subtasks.title: Add configuration validation and graceful degradation handling
subtasks.description: Implement robust configuration validation for refined processing mode and graceful degradation when LLM services are unavailable
subtasks.details: Validate LLM configuration parameters, implement fallback mechanisms for service failures, add appropriate error messages and warnings, ensure graceful degradation to normal processing mode when needed

tasks.title: Create Comprehensive Test Suite
tasks.description: Develop unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests for the entire pipeline system
tasks.details:
Create tests/ directory with:
- Unit tests for each module (utils, pipelines, config)
- Integration tests for complete pipeline workflows
- Mock test data (sample PDFs, HTML files)
- Performance tests for large files
- LLM integration tests with mocked responses
- CLI tests using pytest and typer testing utilities
- Coverage reporting setup
- Continuous integration configuration
tasks.testStrategy: Achieve >90% code coverage, test all major workflows, and verify system behavior under various conditions

subtasks.title: Create unit tests for core utilities and configuration modules
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive unit tests for utility functions, configuration parsers, and core helper modules to ensure basic functionality works correctly
subtasks.details: Write unit tests covering configuration loading, validation, utility functions, error handling, and edge cases. Include tests for file operations, data transformations, and configuration parsing with various input scenarios.

subtasks.title: Implement pipeline-specific unit tests with mock data
subtasks.description: Create unit tests for individual pipeline components using mock data to test processing logic in isolation
subtasks.details: Design mock datasets representing various data formats and edge cases. Test each pipeline stage independently including data ingestion, transformation, validation, and output generation with controlled test data.

subtasks.title: Develop integration tests for complete workflows
subtasks.description: Build end-to-end integration tests that verify complete workflow execution from input to output
subtasks.details: Create test scenarios covering full pipeline execution with real-world data samples. Test workflow orchestration, data flow between components, error propagation, and system state management across complete processing cycles.

subtasks.title: Create CLI testing suite with various scenarios
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive CLI tests covering command-line interface functionality and user interaction scenarios
subtasks.details: Test CLI argument parsing, command execution, help text generation, error messages, and interactive prompts. Include tests for various command combinations, invalid inputs, and edge cases in command-line usage.

subtasks.title: Add performance tests for large files
subtasks.description: Develop performance testing suite to validate system behavior with large datasets and measure processing efficiency
subtasks.details: Create performance benchmarks for large file processing, memory usage monitoring, and execution time measurements. Test scalability limits, resource consumption patterns, and performance degradation thresholds.

subtasks.title: Implement LLM integration tests with mocked responses
subtasks.description: Create tests for LLM integration components using mocked API responses to ensure reliable external service interaction
subtasks.details: Mock LLM API responses for various scenarios including successful responses, errors, timeouts, and rate limiting. Test prompt generation, response parsing, error handling, and retry mechanisms without actual API calls.

subtasks.title: Set up coverage reporting and CI configuration
subtasks.description: Configure test coverage reporting tools and continuous integration pipeline for automated testing
subtasks.details: Set up code coverage tools, configure CI/CD pipeline for automated test execution, establish coverage thresholds, and create reporting dashboards. Include test result notifications and coverage trend monitoring.

tasks.title: Documentation and Deployment Preparation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation and prepare the system for production deployment
tasks.details:
Create documentation:
- Comprehensive README with installation and usage instructions
- API documentation for all modules
- Configuration guide for LLM setup
- Performance tuning recommendations
- Troubleshooting guide
- Example usage scenarios
- Contributing guidelines
- Docker containerization setup
- Deployment scripts and configuration
tasks.testStrategy: Verify documentation accuracy by following installation and usage instructions on clean environment

subtasks.title: Create comprehensive README with installation and usage instructions
subtasks.description: Develop a detailed README.md file that includes project overview, prerequisites, step-by-step installation instructions, basic usage examples, and quick start guide for new users.
subtasks.details: Include sections for project description, features, system requirements, installation methods (package manager, source code), configuration basics, simple usage examples, and links to additional documentation.

subtasks.title: Generate API documentation and configuration guides
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive API documentation including endpoint descriptions, request/response formats, authentication methods, and detailed configuration guides for all system components.
subtasks.details: Document all API endpoints with examples, parameter descriptions, error codes, authentication flows, configuration file formats, environment variables, and integration patterns.

subtasks.title: Write troubleshooting guide and example scenarios
subtasks.description: Develop a comprehensive troubleshooting guide with common issues, solutions, debugging steps, and practical example scenarios demonstrating various use cases.
subtasks.details: Include FAQ section, common error messages and solutions, debugging techniques, logging configuration, performance optimization tips, and real-world usage scenarios with code examples.

subtasks.title: Set up Docker containerization and deployment scripts
subtasks.description: Create Docker configuration files, deployment scripts, and container orchestration setup for easy deployment and scaling of the application.
subtasks.details: Develop Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, deployment scripts for various environments, container health checks, volume configurations, and CI/CD pipeline integration.

subtasks.title: Create contributing guidelines and development setup documentation
subtasks.description: Establish comprehensive contributing guidelines, development environment setup instructions, coding standards, and workflow documentation for contributors.
subtasks.details: Include contribution workflow, code style guidelines, testing requirements, development environment setup, pull request templates, issue templates, and maintainer guidelines.
